# Mona and the Fork of Curiosity

<img width="250px" alt="mona-intro" src="https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/11df579f-02bd-439c-b0b4-cbc79859a372" align="right">

In a dusty Repository Ruins, you meet **Mona the Octocat**, swirling and weaving thread from ancient scrolls. Curved and interconnected lines span the room and decorate the walls.

Oddly... many a branch hang with donuts where merges appear to have failed.

Sipping on cold brew, she says:
